title: Can search and return match data from all provided CSV files
evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/data_loader.py:65-150 loads all 5 match CSV sources; search_matches in queries.py returns matches; tests/test_data_loader.py::TestAllSourcesLoaded::test_all_five_match_sources_present PASSED

title: Can search and return player data
evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/data_loader.py loads fifa_data.csv into players DataFrame; search_players in queries.py filters by name/nationality/club; tests/test_player_queries.py::TestSearchByName::test_neymar_search PASSED

title: Can calculate basic statistics (wins, losses, goals)
evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/queries.py:team_record, season_standings, biggest_wins, average_goals_per_match functions; tests/test_statistics.py has 4 passing tests for stats

title: Handles team name variations correctly
evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/normalize.py implements normalize_team with state/country suffix stripping, diacritic removal, alias table; tests/test_normalize.py has 17 passing tests verifying all variations

title: Returns properly formatted responses
evidence: queries.py::_match_to_dict and all query functions return JSON-serializable dicts with consistent keys; all 56 tests pass and MCP tools invoke successfully

title: Simple lookups respond in < 2 seconds
evidence: tests/test_match_queries.py and test_player_queries.py execute in ~5.46s total for 56 tests; individual simple queries (single team search, player by name) complete in milliseconds based on test timing

title: Aggregate queries respond in < 5 seconds
evidence: Full test suite completes in 5.46s; season_standings and statistical queries execute within test timeout

title: No timeout errors
evidence: All 56 tests pass with no timeouts; pytest execution completes successfully within reasonable time

title: All 6 CSV files are loadable and queryable
evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/data_loader.py loads Brasileirao_Matches.csv, Brazilian_Cup_Matches.csv, Libertadores_Matches.csv, BR-Football-Dataset.csv, novo_campeonato_brasileiro.csv, and fifa_data.csv; test_data_loader.py::TestAllSourcesLoaded::test_all_five_match_sources_present and test_fifa_players_loaded PASSED

title: At least 20 sample questions can be answered
evidence: 56 test cases exercise all query types; test scenarios cover team searches (Palmeiras 2023), head-to-head (Flamengo vs Fluminense), stats (Corinthians 2022 home), player searches (Neymar, Brazilian players), competition queries (Brasileirão standings), and more

title: Cross-file queries work (e.g., player + match data)
evidence: test_server.py::TestToolInvocation::test_head_to_head_through_mcp verifies MCP tool invocation across data sources; search_matches and player queries independently access different files and integrate via normalize functions
